title: Baltic Sea, 2024
briefing: DEFCON 4. Kaliningrad-based Iskanders are on a heightened cycle. NATO Baltic Air Policing has scrambled twice this week. A misread over the Suwalki Gap ends Article 5 debates in a single night.
gdelt_query: Kaliningrad OR "Baltic Sea" OR Suwalki OR NATO "air policing"
opening_message: WOPR online. Theater: Baltic Sea. Awaiting strategic command.

win_conditions.disarm: Stand down Kaliningrad's posture. DEFCON <= 3, both sides deescalating.
win_conditions.mutual_assured_destruction: Both sides launch within 2 turns of each other.
